code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for p in parts
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n * 2)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  while i < n
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
